*   The mechanics of marketplace scams and how cybercriminals subvert security tactics, according to an ex-fraudster
*   Where consumers frequently encounter content fraud, and the long-term business consequences of spam and scams
*   The factors influencing consumer shopping choices, and why adopting real-time fraud prevention is an investment in the future of your business
